data.title: Bitcoin's Historical Q4 Performance Post-Halving Analyzed
data.description:
Benjamin Cowen, founder and CEO of Into The Cryptoverse, posted on X, highlighting a recurring pattern in Bitcoin's performance. He noted that Bitcoin has consistently reached its peak during the fourth quarter following a halving year. This observation suggests a historical trend where Bitcoin's value tends to rise significantly during this specific period.

Cowen's analysis points to the cyclical nature of Bitcoin's market behavior, emphasizing the importance of understanding these patterns for investors and traders. The post-halving year is often marked by increased volatility and potential for substantial gains, making it a critical time for market participants to strategize.

While external factors and market dynamics can influence Bitcoin's price, Cowen's insights underscore the significance of historical trends in predicting future movements. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, recognizing these patterns can provide valuable guidance for those looking to navigate the complexities of Bitcoin trading.

data.title: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio Repositions Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
On January 30, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights on his personal channel regarding recent market movements. According to BlockBeats, Ng Ah Sio has redeployed a reasonably sized position following a series of market setbacks that have seemingly ousted even the most steadfast bulls. The prevailing sentiment is marked by widespread frustration and capitulation, with many predicting further price declines.

Ng Ah Sio believes the current risk-reward ratio for going long is favorable, with a clear stop-loss set below $80,000. He expressed confidence that crypto assets will not underperform all risk assets in the long term and suggested that the market is likely nearing the end of its current weak phase. He concluded that it is time to take action again.

data.title: Polymarket Bets on Trump's Nomination of Walsh for Fed Chair Rise
data.description: The probability of U.S. President Donald Trump nominating Walsh as the Federal Reserve Chair has surged to 95% on Polymarket. According to Foresight News, the likelihood for other candidates has dropped below 5%.

data.title: A whale deposited $1.87 million into Hyperliquid and opened a 20x leveraged long position in ETH, worth $18 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale sold 699 ETH after two years of inactivity, obtaining 1.876 million USDC, deposited it into Hyperliquid, and opened a $18 million ETH 20x leveraged long position.

data.title: Securitize plans to merge and list on Nasdaq; revenue for the first nine months of 2025 increased by 841% year-over-year.
data.description: Tokenization company Securitize announced revenue of $55.6 million for the first nine months of 2025, an 841% increase compared to the same period in 2024. The company has filed a public registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to advance its plans for a merger with Cantor Equity Partners II (CEPT), a company backed by Cantor Fitzgerald. The merger with CEPT is still subject to shareholder and regulatory approval. If approved, Securitize will trade as a publicly traded company on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SECZ. (Coindesk)

data.title: Nomura Highlights Pressure on Dollar and U.S. Treasury Yields
data.description: Nomura Securities has identified upward pressure on the dollar and U.S. Treasury yields. According to ChainCatcher, former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh's policy stance is perceived as less dovish.

data.title: Gold and Precious Metals Surge May Impact Stock and Bond Markets
data.description: Bertram Lai from CGS International has highlighted in a report that the ongoing rise in gold and other precious metals could lead to volatility in stock and bond markets. According to Odaily, Lai noted that gold and other precious metals appear to be in a self-reinforcing feedback loop, where their price movements have become news driving further price changes. This situation may affect investors' perception of risks associated with fiat currencies and could potentially widen the bond risk premium at the long end of the yield curve. He further stated that a significant repricing of bond risk premiums in the coming months could trigger substantial fluctuations in stock and credit markets.

data.title: Japan's JERA Explores LNG Procurement from Alaska Project
data.description: Japan's largest power company, JERA, is exploring the possibility of procuring liquefied natural gas (LNG) from an Alaskan project. According to Jin10, the company has clarified that it does not intend to invest in the project. This move aligns with JERA's strategy to secure stable energy supplies amid global market fluctuations. The company is assessing various options to enhance its LNG portfolio, ensuring energy security for Japan. The decision not to invest indicates a cautious approach, focusing on procurement rather than financial involvement in the project.

data.title: Japan's Strategy Provides Temporary Relief for Yen Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
Japan has successfully secured a temporary respite for the yen without any evidence of large-scale intervention, according to foreign media analysis. This suggests that Japan's strategy of leveraging fears of joint intervention with the U.S. has been effective in the short term. According to Jin10, just a week ago, Japanese policymakers faced challenges with rising bond yields, stock market risks, and the Bank of Japan's unclear stance on interest rate hikes. Within days, the USD/JPY exchange rate fell from above 160 to around 153, driven by concerns over potential coordinated actions between Japan and the U.S., aided by timely execution.

U.S. President Donald Trump's mild stance on the dollar's depreciation has sparked speculation about a long-term downward trend for the dollar, impacting not only the yen but also various other currencies. However, whether this trend will persist remains uncertain, making Japan's recent success fragile. If the USD/JPY moves back towards 160, Japan may need to implement more substantial measures to replicate its success.

data.title: STH-RP Indicator and Its Impact on Market Sentiment
data.description:
Crypto KOL Murphy posted on X about the significance of the STH-RP (Short-Term Holder Realized Price) indicator, which is often regarded by on-chain data analysts as a marker distinguishing bull and bear market phases. When the price is above the STH-RP, it indicates bullish sentiment, whereas a price below suggests bearish sentiment.

Currently, the STH-RP is higher than the price and is showing a downward trend with a negative seven-day rate of change. This raises questions about the underlying information and logic, as well as its decisive impact on market trends.

Murphy poses a question to the audience: Why does the STH-RP sometimes rise and sometimes fall? Is it related to the fluctuations in BTC's price, or is there no direct correlation? Readers are encouraged to share their thoughts and reasons in the comments section.

Murphy also reflects on the current market downturn, suggesting it is an opportune time for reflection and learning. He recalls writing numerous educational posts between March and October 2024, explaining the underlying logic and application methods of on-chain data. He emphasizes that if financial gains are not possible at the moment, one can focus on gaining knowledge, experience, credentials, and networking, which will eventually lead to financial success.

data.title: South Korea's Financial Services Commission plans to limit individual shareholder ownership in cryptocurrency exchanges to a maximum of 20%.
data.description: South Korean regulators are pushing for legal amendments to limit the shareholding percentages of major shareholders in cryptocurrency exchanges. According to the proposal, the Financial Services Commission (FSC) plans to conduct qualification reviews of major shareholders of Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs), proposing to set a shareholding cap of 15% to 20% to avoid conflicts of interest. This move aims to increase market transparency and strengthen the regulation of exchange operations. The proposal has been submitted to the National Assembly for deliberation. (DLNews)

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Decline Amid Reports of Kevin Warsh's Fed Chair Nomination
data.description: U.S. stock futures have experienced a decline following reports regarding the potential nomination of Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve Chair. According to ChainCatcher, the news has led to an expansion of losses in the futures market. The development comes amid ongoing speculation about leadership changes at the Federal Reserve, which plays a crucial role in shaping U.S. monetary policy.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 840 USDT with a 6.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 30, 2026, 02:22 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 840 USDT and is now trading at 839.900024 USDT, with a narrowed 6.69% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Caldera and BitcoinOS Forge Partnership to Advance Bitcoin Rollup Development
data.description: Caldera has announced a strategic partnership with BitcoinOS to enhance the development of modular Bitcoin-native rollups. According to Odaily, this collaboration aims to integrate Caldera's production-grade RaaS technology stack with BitcoinOS's trust-minimized settlement system. The partnership seeks to offer developers rapid rollup deployment, a flexible execution environment, and Bitcoin-native security primitives, while maintaining a clear path for upgrades to decentralized sequencing, ZK proofs, and external state anchoring. The two entities will collaborate on ecosystem rollup support, proof verification layer integration, and market promotion.

data.title: The US dollar index (DXY) rose 20 points in the short term, last trading at 96.72.
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) rose 20 points in the short term, last trading at 96.72, after reports that the Trump administration was preparing to confirm former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh's nomination as Federal Reserve Chair. (Jinshi)

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of "Kevin Warsh being nominated as the new Federal Reserve Chairman" has surged to 95%.
data.description: According to data from the prediction market Polymarket, the probability of former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh being nominated by Trump as the new chairman of the Federal Reserve has surged again to 95%.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation AI Lead: The ERC-8004 standard has been released on the Ethereum mainnet.
data.description: Davide Crapis, Head of AI at the Ethereum Foundation, announced on the X platform that the ERC-8004 standard has been released on the Ethereum mainnet. This standard is a specification for trustless agents, and over 10,000 agents had previously registered on the testnet. Starting today, the standard is officially released on the Ethereum mainnet, launching the 8004 genesis month event.

data.title: Caldera and BitcoinOS have entered into a strategic partnership to advance the development of modular Bitcoin native rollups.
data.description: Caldera has announced an ecosystem partnership with BitcoinOS. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of modular, native Bitcoin Rollups. The plan is to combine Caldera's production-grade RaaS technology stack with bitcoinOS's trust-minimized settlement system, providing developers with rapid rollup deployment, a flexible execution environment, and native Bitcoin security primitives, while preserving a clear path to upgrades to decentralized ordering, ZK proofs, and external state anchoring. The two companies will collaborate on joint support for ecosystem rollups, deep integration of proof verification layers, and market promotion.

data.title: Dollar Index Sees Significant Daily Increase
data.description: The dollar index (DXY) has experienced a notable rise of 0.5% within the day, currently standing at 96.64. According to ChainCatcher, this increase reflects ongoing fluctuations in the currency market. The dollar index is a measure of the value of the United States dollar relative to a basket of foreign currencies, and its movements are closely monitored by investors and analysts. The recent uptick may influence various economic sectors and trading strategies.
